steps.title: Identify the causal signal
steps.content: The previous sentence states that flying buttresses “eliminated” the need for thick walls. The blank must introduce the consequence of that elimination.

steps.title: Select the transition that fits
steps.content: ”As a result” directly signals the consequence of the previous statement. The other options—similarity, examples, and contrast—don't match the cause-effect progression of the passage. That matches choice D — D is correct.
